message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Actor" as actor
boundary "Boundary" as boundary
entity "Entity" as entity
control "Control" as control1
control "Control" as control2
control "Control" as control3

actor -> boundary : authorization Request
boundary -> entity : gson.fromJson(user, User.class);
boundary -> control1 : userService.userValidation(user)
control1 -> control2 : tokenService.createToken(user.getName())
control2 --> control1 : Token
control1 --> boundary : Token
boundary --> actor : authorization Response Token

@enduml
